Tae Young Ryu.

14-year-old designer & developer from South Korea. I make small internet things in the cracks between school and sleep.

About

Hello.

I'm Tae Young. I go by @ty2035 online.

I'm 14. I live in Seoul and I'm in middle school. I make games on Entry, design interfaces in Figma, and write websites in HTML and CSS and a bit of JavaScript. This is my corner of the internet.

I think I like making things mostly because it's the opposite of homework. Nobody tells you what it should look like. Nobody grades it. You just keep going until it feels right.

I care about small details — the way a button feels when you press it, the space between two lines of text, whether a color is slightly too loud. Most of what I'm learning is how to trust when something is done.
